title: pulicarioidea annamica
intro: Pulicarioidea annamica, also known as Vietnamese fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to Vietnam. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pulicarioidea annamica include relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections, making it a valuable natural remedy for colds, flu, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications for external use.
